name: Respite
description: Structured rest phases with terrain-aware events, campfire rituals, forage tables, and profession crafting. Keeps the GM in the narrative, not the bookkeeping.
detailBody: Make Camp places a full rest scene on the map: campfire, workbench, forage station, and profession hooks tied to the party's location.
Terrain-aware events, cooking, and identification run through the same panel so the GM stays in the scene instead of flipping between spreadsheets and journals.

name: Resonance
description: Context-sensitive ambient sound. Crit stingers, weapon hits, voice cues, and Daggerheart fear/hope triggers, automatically synced to combat and dice rolls.
detailBody: Ambience follows the scene: forest beds under travel, combat stingers on crits and fumbles, weapon hits matched to the attack type.
The soundboard at ionrift.cloud is a slice of the same library. Install the full module for automatic combat sync and Daggerheart fear and hope triggers.

name: Quartermaster
description: Tier-tuned loot cache generation, signature item tracking, curse progression, and content pack delivery, all in one GM panel.
detailBody: Generate tier-tuned loot caches with terrain-themed containers, track signature items across the campaign, and compile content pack overlays from one panel.
Curse progression hooks into the same inventory view when Cursewright is installed. The loot generator on ionrift.cloud previews cache generation without Foundry.

name: Cursewright
description: Escalating curses with combat intervention, GM activation gates, and a growing library of handcrafted cursed items. The dread your loot table has been missing.
detailBody: Curses escalate across sessions with GM activation gates, combat intervention, and handcrafted items designed for discovery rather than stat sticks.
Install through the Patreon cloud manifest. Premium tier unlocks the module and its growing library of cursed items.

name: Waterline
description: Click water on a map to trace its shape, then render animated caustics with live-tunable speed, distortion, and opacity. Also generates procedural border walls so map edges feel organic.
detailBody: Click water on a map to flood-fill its shape, then tune animated caustics: speed, distortion, opacity, all live on the canvas.
Procedural border walls trace map edges so outdoor scenes feel less rectangular without hand-drawing every segment.

name: Daggerheart Animator
description: Bridges Daggerheart monster attacks to Automated Animations. Generates temporary weapon items during rolls so animation hooks fire for claws, bites, and ranged abilities. No configuration needed.
detailBody: Monster attacks in Daggerheart often lack weapon items for Automated Animations to hook into. This module generates temporary weapons during the roll so claws, bites, and breath weapons animate without configuration.
Works alongside the Daggerheart system and Automated Animations modules. No per-monster setup required.

name: Cartographer
description: Something new is taking shape. We are only sharing the name for now.

name: Civic Architect
description: Early days. The name is all we are sharing while it takes shape.
